_comment: Example performance baseline for the Heady promotion pipeline. Generated by performance-baseline.yml. ALL numeric values derive from φ=1.618033988749895 and Fibonacci sequences.

cslLevels._comment: CSL pressure levels from φ-derived golden ratio proportions

GET /health/live._comment: Liveness probe — should be sub-φ ms (< 2ms). φ^1 ≈ 1.618ms ideal.
GET /health/live._phi_note: p95=5=fib(5), p99=8=fib(6), p999=13=fib(7) — Fibonacci latency band

GET /health/ready._comment: Readiness probe — slightly slower than live (checks dependencies).
GET /health/ready._phi_note: p50=5=fib(5), p75=8=fib(6), p95=13=fib(7), p99=21=fib(8) — pure Fibonacci ladder

GET /api/brain/status._comment: Brain service status — involves Redis lookup. φ-scaled: 21ms base.
GET /api/brain/status._phi_note: p95=55=fib(10), p99=89=fib(11), p999=144=fib(12) — Fibonacci SLA ladder

GET /api/conductor/status._comment: Conductor orchestration status — involves state machine lookup.
GET /api/conductor/status._phi_note: Same Fibonacci SLA ladder as brain — consistent design

startup._comment: Cold/warm start times. Cold start budget: fib(10)=55 × fib(9)=34 = 1870ms (≈ φ^3 × 1000 = 4236ms max)

memory._comment: Memory baseline. Heap budgets use fib(16)=987 MB max for full monorepo.

bundles._comment: Bundle sizes in bytes. Reference values — actual sizes depend on build.
bundles._phi_note: All sizes approximate Fibonacci KB values: 5,8,13,21,34,55,89,144 KB

throughput._comment: Requests per second at various concurrency levels (Fibonacci)
throughput._phi_note: concurrency_8=1597=fib(17) req/s target — peak throughput at fib(7)=13 concurrent users

phiConstants._comment: φ-derived values used throughout the pipeline for reference
